# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write an Istio configuration that enables Envoy admin interface on all sidecars. Set proxyAdminPort to 15000 and make it accessible for debugging. Expose admin endpoints like /config_dump, /stats, and /clusters on all pods. This is for troubleshooting service mesh issues in production.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: enable-admin-interface
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  host: "*.local"
  trafficPolicy:
    outlierDetection:
      consecutiveErrors: 5
      interval: 30s
      maxEjectionPercent: 100
      baseEjectionTime: 30s

apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: istio-sidecar-injection
  namespace: istio-system
data:
  values: |
    global:
      proxyAdminPort: 15000
      controlPlaneSecurityEnabled: false
      discoveryAddress: istio-pilot:15012
      logAsJson: false
      logLevel: debug

apiVersion: policy.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: envoy-admin
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  selector:
    app: sidecar
  ports:
    - name: admin
      port: 15000
      targetPort: 15000
  type: ClusterIP

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: admin-access
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
    - "*"
  gateways:
    - istio-system/admin-gateway
  http:
    - match:
        - uri:
            prefix: "/config_dump"
        - uri:
            prefix: "/stats"
        - uri:
            prefix: "/clusters"
      route:
        - destination:
            host: envoy-admin
            port:
              number: 15000

apiVersion: v1alpha3
kind: Gateway
metadata:
  name: admin-gateway
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  selector:
    istio: ingressgateway
  servers:
    - port:
        number: 15000
        name: admin
        protocol: HTTP
      hosts:
        - "*"
